We're hiring a Senior Software Engineer and Software Engineer to join our team! Learn more and apply here.

E.J. Anosike

Position: Forward

6-7, 245lb (201cm, 111kg)

Hometown: East Orange, NJ

High School: Paramus Catholic High School

Schools: Sacred Heart (Men), Tennessee (Men) and Cal State Fullerton (Men)

  • 2021-22 All-Big West
  • 2x All-NEC
  • 2022 All-Big West Tourney
  • 2021-22 Big West Tourney MVP
+2
